section_title: Intentional omission to give information of offence by person bound to inform
chapter_title: Of False Evidence and Offences Against Public Justice
text: Whoever, knowing or having reason to believe that an offence has been committed, intentionally omits to give any information respecting that offence which he is legally bound to give, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.
